pred_reason: The contract violates SWC-101 by using block.timestamp for interest calculations, which miners can manipulate. It also violates SWC-107 by having multiple external calls without proper reentrancy protection in functions like wipe. Evidence: Block.timestamp used in compounding/interest functions without protection against miner manipulation; External calls in wipe function made before state changes, violating checks-effects-interactions; Multiple external calls to potentially untrusted contracts (mgr, reserve) without reentrancy guards

raw.pred_reason: The contract violates SWC-101 by using block.timestamp for interest calculations, which miners can manipulate. It also violates SWC-107 by having multiple external calls without proper reentrancy protection in functions like wipe. Evidence: Block.timestamp used in compounding/interest functions without protection against miner manipulation; External calls in wipe function made before state changes, violating checks-effects-interactions; Multiple external calls to potentially untrusted contracts (mgr, reserve) without reentrancy guards

llm_explanation.reason: The contract violates SWC-101 by using block.timestamp for interest calculations, which miners can manipulate. It also violates SWC-107 by having multiple external calls without proper reentrancy protection in functions like wipe.
evidence: Block.timestamp used in compounding/interest functions without protection against miner manipulation
External calls in wipe function made before state changes, violating checks-effects-interactions
Multiple external calls to potentially untrusted contracts (mgr, reserve) without reentrancy guards
